summary:
Created /Users/aniborthagaray/Documents/Claude/Projects/Design System Amalgama/islands/src/islands/ButtonPhaseB.tsx exporting 30 React components that re-render every variant/state/do-don't/live-preview example on the s-c-button page using the real @ds Button (import { Button } from "@ds/button") with variant/size props (primary|secondary|tertiary|text|icon|danger|success, sizes xs|sm|default|lg|xl) and lucide-react icons. Verified the API against packages/ds/components/ui/button.tsx and confirmed the simulation utilities used (focus-ring @utility, bg-primary-hover, bg-secondary-container-hover, bg-surface-variant, brightness-*, bg-primary-state-hover/press, animate-spin) all resolve to registered Embassy tokens in islands/src/styles.css + packages/ds/css. STATES section: the original rendered light+dark side-by-side with hardcoded-hex .bst-btn swatches and manual hover/focus/pressed layers — I collapsed this to ONE island (ButtonStatesShowcase) rendering a single mode per the canonical one-mode rule, with one strip per variant (relleno/tonal/con borde/texto) showing Habilitado (real)/Deshabilitado (real disabled)/Hover/Enfocado/Presionado (approximated via the component's own state-token utility classes, still the real Button). For do/don't panels the real Button is shown misused (className="w-full justify-start", style borderRadius:9999, uppercase, generic/long labels, nav-as-button). The toggle pattern (page-local btn-toggle-off/-on, not Embassy classes) is rendered as real tertiary=off / secondary=on Buttons with aria-pressed.

IMPORTANT scoping notes for the orchestrator: (1) The States section is one large block (index.html ~5781-5920, five bst-variant-block divs). I provide ONE findBlock spanning the whole States content for a single island slot; replacing the 5 individual variant blocks individually would be brittle because the per-cell markup is near-identical across blocks (not globally unique). (2) The Specs anatomy (~5739) and Medidas (~5985) diagrams and ALL escaped <code>/<pre> blocks are intentionally left untouched. (3) The hierarchy table buttons are returned as 5 separate single-cell islands so the accompanying <code> class labels remain in the table cells. (4) index.html and main.tsx were NOT edited (orchestrator wires those). Token-violation note: the bespoke bst-btn hex CSS and .bd-dark-demo are eliminated by the States conversion; the orchestrator may also remove the now-dead .bst-* page-local CSS.

summary: Islandized all 10 live CSS-class examples on the s-c-seg-btn page: 3 Specs "Configuraciones" size demos (sm/md/lg), 3 Specs "Estados" demos (default/selected/disabled), and 4 Guidelines "Hacer y no hacer" demos (do-views, dont-actions, do-period, dont-toomany). Each is a separate export in SegBtnPhaseB.tsx using the real @ds/segmented-button (SegmentedButtonGroup/SegmentedButtonItem, value/onValueChange, size sm|md|lg). The two DON'T panels still render the real component, just misused (CTAs as segments; 5 segments). KEPT untouched per audit: the Anatomy SVG, the Color Roles token table, the "Clases CSS" reference table, and all escaped <code> HTML/React/JS snippets in the Code tab. findBlocks for the size demos target the inner seg-btn-group inside each table <td>; state demos target the seg-btn-group inside each bd-state wrapper; do/don't demos target the seg-btn-group inside each sbd-stage. All findBlocks are globally unique by their exact label/value combinations.

Islandized the 8 live Specs-tab Input examples on the s-c-input page (Basico, Con placeholder, Required, Disabled, Focus state, Grid de formulario, Number Input, Date Input). Each now renders via the real @ds Input component instead of static .field-input/.field-group CSS-class markup. Variants the base component does not cover by prop (number stepper, date trailing icon, 2-col grid) compose the real <Input> with Embassy token utilities (bg-card, border-border, text-on-surface-variant, rounded-sm) and lucide-react Calendar — no raw hex. The Overview island (data-island="input-showcase") was already wired and is untouched. NOT touched: the Estados / Clases y tokens / Medidas spec tables, the Embassy-vs-MD3 callout, and all escaped <code> snippets in the Code tab (teaching content). Note: the audit listed proposedIslandName "input-showcase" for all 8, but that key is already used by the Overview island, so I assigned distinct per-example registry keys.

summary: Islandized all 7 live CSS-class Search examples on the s-c-search page into 5 React showcase exports backed by the real @ds/search components (SearchBar, SearchBarTrailing, SearchBarAvatar). The Specs "Search + acciones" section had 3 examples (two siblings in a cg-two-col + one full-width row); these are consolidated into one SearchActionsShowcase island (3 stacked rows) replacing both the cg-two-col and the trailing full-width preview, while KEEPING the explanatory caption. Guidelines Desktop and Mobile examples and the two Code-tab bd-stage live previews each became their own island. Note: `.search-icon-btn` has NO shipped React wrapper — Search is a CSS-class component family — so the canonical DS class IS the real element for the 40px circular action buttons; the SearchBar itself is the real React component. All anatomy/measurement/state/color SVG diagrams, the escaped <code> snippets, and the class-reference/semantics tables were left untouched. The mobile standalone bar uses containerClassName="max-w-full" (token utility) to mirror the legacy inline max-width:100%.
